name: Senba Sensing Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Senba Sensing Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of photoelectric components in China. The company offers digital and analog PIR sensors, LDR photoresistors, analog optoisolators, linear light sensor, Fresnel lens, PIR sensor modules, and infrared bandpass fliters. Its components are used in toys, lighting, switches, household appliances, medical, industry, security, military, and other fields. The company was formerly known as Nan Yang Senba Optical and Electronic Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Senba Sensing Technology Co., Ltd. in April 2018. Senba Sensing Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
